place: Ban Makham, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Five-Bedroom Villa with Sea-View Pool
blurb: A beachfront five-bedroom villa on Koh Samui's quiet north-west coast at Ban Makham, sleeping up to ten. An infinity-edge pool above the sand, a BBQ sala, a private gym and a pool-table bar, with 340 m² of contemporary interior opening to wide terraces. Villa manager and daily housekeeping included; sunset views across the Gulf.
detail:
This five-bedroom villa sits directly on the sand at Ban Makham, on the calm, sunset-facing north-west coast of Koh Samui. An infinity-edge pool overlooks the beach, and the outlook reaches across the Gulf. Days move between the water, the pool and the shade of an outdoor sala — with Bang Po beach a few minutes away and Nathon around ten.

Inside, 340 m² of air-conditioned living opens through sliding walls to roughly 250 m² of terraces and covered outdoor space. A large open-plan lounge and dining area sits beside a fully equipped modern Western kitchen, and an entertainment corner with a pool table and bar, a private gym and a studio/office give the house plenty of room to spread out. A barbecue sala anchors the garden for long, social evenings.

Five en-suite bedrooms sleep up to ten adults. A dedicated villa manager, daily housekeeping, linen changes and pool towels are included, along with private parking, leaving little to arrange beyond deciding between the pool and the sand.

features.l: Direct access to Ban Makham Beach
